title: Resignation of members
doc_html:
§32.  Resignation of members

Any member of the Senate or House of Representatives wishing to resign shall direct his letter of resignation to the presiding officer of the house of the legislature of which he is a member.  

Acts 1993, No. 251, §1.
doc_text:
§32.  Resignation of members
Any member of the Senate or House of Representatives wishing to resign shall direct his letter of resignation to the presiding officer of the house of the legislature of which he is a member.
Acts 1993, No. 251, §1.
